description_long: This is a modern, rectangular cabinet with a natural wood finish on the top, sides, and legs, and colored front panels. The front features two doors and a central drawer or compartment, with the doors finished in a muted green and the top and sides in a light, natural wood grain. The legs are angled outward, giving the piece a mid-century modern aesthetic. The cabinet appears to have a smooth, matte finish, and the front panels are accented with small, square metallic handles. The central section includes an open shelf above the drawer, suitable for media devices or display. This piece is designed to be freestanding and would fit well in urban interiors such as living rooms, lobbies, or offices.
description: A modern, freestanding cabinet with natural wood sides and top, green front doors, and angled wooden legs. Features include two doors, a central drawer, and an open shelf.
description_view_0: Front view showing a plain white panel with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the wood grain texture and the depth of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Front view with green doors, a central drawer, an open shelf, and small metallic handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the wood grain and cabinet depth.
